curiosityQuestion: Have you ever wondered how Spring Data JPA works under the hood in Java?
whyExists: Spring Data JPA is a core building block in Java. It solves fundamental structural and data manipulation problems that arise when building scalable applications.
realWorldAnalogy: Think of Spring Data JPA like a well-designed component in an everyday physical system — organizing, transforming, and routing data efficiently.
simpleExplanation: At its foundation, Spring Data JPA provides a clear, standardized way to execute logic in Java. This section explains every detail step by step from absolute zero.
